name: Roquefort Cheesecake (Bon Appetit/July 1983)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Mix breadcrumbs and Parmesan. Sprinkle the mixture into the pan, turning to coat. Refrigerate.
4. Fry bacon in a heavy medium skillet until crisp. Remove with tongs and drain on paper towel.
5. Pour off all but about 1 tablespoon of bacon fat from the skillet.
6. Add onion. Cover and cook over low heat until translucent, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.
7. Crumble the bacon.
8. Mix cream cheese and Roquefort in a blender or processor until smooth.
9. Add eggs, cream, salt, and pepper sauce; process until smooth.
10. Blend in bacon and onion; the filling should retain some texture.
11. Pour into prepared pan.
12. Set pan in roasting pan. Add enough hot water to come halfway up the sides of the springform pan.
13. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
14. Turn off the oven and cool cheesecake about 1 hour with the door ajar.
15. Transfer to a rack. Cool to room temperature before removing from pan and serving.
